description: Conversation-level gates that prevent tools from being called out of order during buyer conversations

gates.description: PRD must be generated and shared before presenting package options
gates.error_message: Cannot present packages before PRD is generated. Call run_pipeline with stop_after='prd' first, share the PRD with the buyer, and wait for their response before discussing pricing.
gates.instruction: Tell the buyer: 'Before I put together pricing, let me map out exactly what your app will include so we're on the same page.' Then call run_pipeline.
